### Acceptance criteria

- [ ] The documentation is clear and easy to follow
- [ ] The documentation matches the current code
- [ ] Commands are tested if commands are included
- [ ] No sensitive data, private URLs, passwords, or tokens are included
- [ ] Screenshots are updated if needed
